narrative:
Precinct Bolivar Village (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 616 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a clear Republican lean of 6.5 percentage points.
